title: tropaeolum luteum
intro: Tropaeolum luteum, also known as the yellow flowering nasturtium, is a flowering plant species in the nasturtium genus, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. Tropaeolum luteum has been reported to have several health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing inflammation, and improving digestion, likely due to its high levels of vitamins and minerals. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
